name: Bridgehampton's 3rd Annual Art Affair on 4th of July Weekend
description:
Join us for a 3-day art-filled experience at the Bridgehampton Art Affair on 4th of July Weekend! Taking place on the stunning lawns of the prestigious Bridgehampton Museum, this event will showcase the very best in fine art.

The Bridgehampton Museum has been a long-standing hub for the art market, and its rich history and reputation for hosting exceptional fine art events make it the perfect venue for our Art Affair. Conveniently located along the iconic Montauk Highway, the Bridgehampton Museum offers ample on-site parking for all of our patrons. After experiencing the excitement of the A...

name: 23rd Annual Downtown Aspen Art Festival
description:
The Downtown Aspen Art Festival has evolved into a three-day celebration. Paepcke Park, located right on Main Street, provides a stunning and picturesque backdrop for the event. We are excited to invite you to join us for the festivities at this extraordinary location. It is a source of great pride for us to host an art fair in the vibrant center of downtown. Visitors can look forward to a prestigious event showcasing both renowned national and local artists. Additionally, the park's prime location near an RFTA stop ensures easy access for everyone.

As the nation’s largest art festival prod...

name: 10th Anniversary Keystone River Run Village Art Festival
description:
We are excited to return to Keystone for an extraordinary three-day event! Artists from across the nation will gather at the stunning River Run Village in Keystone. Prepare to indulge in shopping and find that unique piece of art that will forever remind you of your time in the mountains. This art festival is a juried event, featuring artists presenting their best creations. Admission is complimentary, ensuring a memorable experience for all attendees. 

As the nation’s largest art festival producer, Howard Alan Events (HAE) sets the gold standard for outdoor art shows. With a reputation bui...

name: 38th Annual Beaver Creek Art Festival
description:
The Beaver Creek Art Festival combines the charm of a contemporary town center with the picturesque scenery of an alpine village. This three-day event takes place in a stunning location that serves as an ideal backdrop for such a remarkable occasion. Attendees can explore and acquire artwork in a secure outdoor environment, showcasing the skills of talented artists and skilled crafters from across the nation.

As the nation’s largest art festival producer, Howard Alan Events (HAE) sets the gold standard for outdoor art shows. With a reputation built on over three decades of excellence, we ta...

name: 29th Annual Shadyside...The Art Festival on Walnut Street
description: Shadyside… The Art Festival on Walnut Street is a beloved summer art exhibition situated in the Shadyside neighborhood of Pittsburgh, PA. This vibrant area, known for its tree-lined avenues, historic residences, and fashionable establishments, will once again be converted into an open-air gallery showcasing fine art. Walnut Street caters to all tastes, featuring distinctive local boutiques, and a wide array of restaurants, bars, and eateries offering diverse culinary options. Attendees can explore and acquire artwork from both national and local artists, ensuring there is something appealing f...

name: 2nd Annual East Hampton Art Affair at Herrick Park
description: We will be returning to East Hampton for a second event this summer! This gathering will take place in the picturesque Herrick Park, located in the heart of East Hampton. Attendees can look forward to an impressive array of distinguished exhibitors showcasing their exceptional works along the bustling Newton Lane, a prominent street in the area. The park is easily reachable from the renowned shopping district, featuring luxury brands such as Chanel, Prada, and other upscale boutiques. We warmly invite you to join us for this delightful celebration of fine art set against the stunning backdrop ...

name: 4th Annual Bridgehampton Art Affair on Labor Day Weekend
description:
Join us for an immersive 3-day celebration of art at the Bridgehampton Art Affair! Set against the picturesque backdrop of the esteemed Bridgehampton Museum, this event will feature an outstanding selection of fine art. Conveniently situated along the iconic Montauk Highway, the museum provides ample on-site parking for all attendees. After enjoying the vibrant atmosphere of the Art Affair, take the opportunity to explore the delightful shops and boutiques that Bridgehampton is well-known for.



As the nation’s largest art festival producer, Howard Alan Events (HAE) sets the gold standard...

name: 4th Annual St. Armands Circle Art Festival with Craft Marketplace
description: If you're considering a visit to Sarasota, be sure to include this event in your itinerary! Just a short distance from Sarasota lies St. Armands Key, a luxurious retreat from the fast pace of mainland life. This charming destination offers a delightful escape, featuring an array of upscale shops and gourmet dining options. With its unique blend of history, beauty, and concept, St. Armands promises an unforgettable experience for all who visit. Over the course of two days, attendees will have the opportunity to explore creations from the finest local and national artists and crafters, including...

name: 24th Annual Alexandria Art Festival
description: John Carlyle Square is a vibrant mixed-use community located in the Eisenhower East district of Alexandria. This neighborhood, situated in the historic Old Town, boasts numerous natural open spaces and parks, along with a retail and entertainment center that caters to both local residents and visitors from the surrounding areas. Alexandria is celebrated as one of the leading artistic centers in the nation. The artwork showcased here is selected through a juried process, ensuring a high standard of quality, diversity, and creativity, highlighting the talents of artists from across the country. ...

name: 39th Annual Las Olas Art Fair
description:
Situated in the vibrant center of Fort Lauderdale, Las Olas Boulevard is often regarded as the city's crown jewel. This lively avenue offers everything needed for an enjoyable evening or a leisurely day spent browsing shops and dining at charming sidewalk cafes. Along Las Olas Boulevard, visitors can explore a diverse array of art galleries, unique boutiques, and a variety of dining establishments, featuring everything from Cuban-American dishes to freshly caught seafood from the Atlantic.

The Las Olas Art Fair is celebrated as one of the top 100 art festivals in the country and remains a h...

name: Lakewood Ranch Art Festival at UTC with Craft Marketplace
description: Lakewood Ranch is an award-winning community in southwest Florida. The Mall at University Town Center (UTC) stands out as the top destination for shopping, dining, and entertainment in Lakewood Ranch, many of which are exclusive to the area. This show features a stunning array of original, hand-crafted artwork, including paintings, pottery, jewelry, photography, and much more. The event also includes a Craft Marketplace, featuring unique hand-made soaps, clothing, and home decor. This is a rare opportunity to meet the artists in person and gain insight into the inspiration behind their one-of-...

name: 38th Annual Downtown Venice Art Festival
description: Situated on Florida's west coast, Venice is a lively town along the Gulf of Mexico, renowned for its historic allure, scenic landscapes, and a variety of locally owned shops and eateries. Often regarded as one of Florida's best-kept secrets, Venice offers numerous delightful surprises for visitors. Whether you enjoy exploring the distinctive boutiques in the downtown Venice Main Street area or engaging in activities like golfing and boating, this town caters to all interests. The Downtown Venice Art Festival, held along West Venice Avenue, enhances the charm of this exceptional community. Over...

name: 2nd Annual Downtown Palm Beach Gardens Art Festival
description: Downtown Palm Beach Gardens is a bustling shopping hub situated in the center of Palm Beach Gardens. Featuring numerous large retail stores and a variety of well-liked restaurants, it is guaranteed to attract shoppers. Positioned off Alt A1A and in proximity to the Gardens Mall, this picturesque venue is ideal for hosting an art festival. The stunning showcase of “pop-up” galleries features thousands of exquisite works of art including life-sized sculpture, paintings, handcrafted fine jewelry, glassworks, photography and more. All artists are on site to discuss their inspirations and processes...

name: 37th Annual St. Armands Circle Art Festival
description: Located just off the coast of Sarasota, a short drive across picturesque bridges leads to St. Armands Key, an island that offers a serene escape from the bustling mainland. Distinct in its concept, history, and natural beauty, St. Armands delivers an unforgettable experience for visitors from around the globe. Nestled in a tropical haven, this charming circle is home to an array of upscale shops and gourmet dining options, ensuring a memorable outing for everyone. Each year, the St. Armands Circle Art Festival showcases the talents of 200 artists, featuring a diverse range of artistic mediums ...

name: 16th Annual Coconut Point Art Festival
description: Exhibitors will take over Coconut Point for two exciting days during this free outdoor event. Wander through an array of life-sized sculptures, stunning paintings, unique jewelry, photography, ceramics, and much more. Whatever you seek, you are sure to discover it among the talented artists at this eagerly awaited art festival. Coconut Point boasts 1.2 million square feet of retail space, office condominiums, and residential options. With 113 shops and 25 dining establishments set around several acres of lakes and boardwalks, Coconut Point is the ideal destination for shopping, dining, working...

name: 26th Annual Downtown Delray Beach Art Festival on 4th
description: This annual juried art festival showcases a diverse array of handcrafted artworks, including glass, photography, painting, mixed media, fiber, jewelry, and more. It features hundreds of artists who will be displaying and selling their creations in an outdoor gallery setting. Explore original art and fine crafts from over 100 exhibitors, ensuring you find something special for everyone on your holiday shopping list! The event kicks off at the intersection of E Atlantic Ave and NE 4th Ave, right in the heart of downtown. The exhibition will continue north along NE 4th Ave for two full blocks, re...

name: Longboat Key Festival of the Arts in Sarasota County
description:
Ring in the New Year at Town Center Green! This public area, situated near Publix on Bay Isles Road, serves as an ideal location for a community festival. With a lovely community park space, there will be ample room for you to unwind and enjoy the celebrations.

As you wander through the complex, you will be enchanted by the life-sized sculptures, breathtaking paintings, distinctive jewelry, beautiful photography, and exquisite ceramics. Additionally, you will have the opportunity to meet and converse with both local and national artists about their creative inspirations and handcrafted piec...

name: Downtown Palm Beach Gardens Fine Art Festival
description: Celebrate the New Year at Downtown at the Gardens! Downtown Palm Beach Gardens is a bustling shopping hub situated in the center of Palm Beach Gardens. Featuring numerous large retail stores and a variety of well-liked restaurants, it is guaranteed to attract shoppers. Positioned off Alt A1A and in proximity to the Gardens Mall, this picturesque venue is ideal for hosting an art festival. The stunning showcase of “pop-up” galleries features thousands of exquisite works of art including life-sized sculpture, paintings, handcrafted fine jewelry, glassworks, photography and more. All artists are ...

name: 30th Anniversary Downtown Dunedin Art Festival with Craft Marketplace
description: Dunedin is one of the oldest towns on the  west coast of Florida, just a short drive from Tampa and home to the Downtown Dunedin Art Festival. Marking its 30th Anniversary, the Downtown Dunedin Art Festival runs down Main Street and showcases award-winning fine artists. Meet the artists and explore an array of mediums including sculpture, photography, glass, paintings, ceramics, jewelry, mixed media and more! This year's event will also feature a seperate craft marketplace.

name: 39th Annual Las Olas Art Fair Part I
description: This season, the iconic artistic event known as The Las Olas Art Fair Part I returns with more than 200 local and national artists in a stunning showcase of art across all mediums. The free, outdoor pet-friendly event features a fully vetted, juried selection of fine art. Considered an annual tradition in South Florida, the Las Olas Art Fair also offers the opportunity to meet with the artists, ask about techniques, commission a specific piece and discover the inspiration behind each magnificent creation. Sculpture, jewelry, woodwork, paintings, wearable art and more are displayed, gallery-sty...

name: 38th Annual Downtown Delray Beach Festival of the Arts
description:
The Downtown Delray Beach Festival of the Arts, consistently ranked as one of the best art affairs in the U.S. by Sunshine Artist Magazine, blends long-time favorites with the most buzz-worthy names on the contemporary arts scene. This juried art festival of hand-crafted artwork includes glass, photography, painting, mixed media, fiber, jewelry and much more. This much anticipated, premiere Delray Beach art festival showcases the fine art of hundreds of artists exhibiting and selling their work in an outdoor gallery.

The show will begin on West Atlantic Avenue in Downtown Delray Beach from ...

name: 39th Annual Boca Fest at the Town Center at Boca Raton
description: The Town Center at Boca Raton is one of South Florida's top luxury shopping destinations and one of Boca's main attractions. It features a mix of upscale and elite specialty shops, fine dining and plenty of parking.  The Town Center at Boca Raton features over 200 stores including Tory Burch, Tiffany & Co, Louis Vuitton, The Apple Store and much more.  Award-winning artists will showcase their fine art and quality craft, transforming the magnificent center into a spectacular festival experience.

name: 24th Annual St. Armands Circle Art Festival
description: St. Armand’s Circle will once again come alive with gallery-style booths filled with every medium of fine art during the St. Armand’s Circle Art Festival. The popular free, outdoor event takes place along South Boulevard of Presidents and inside St. Armand’s Circle. National and local artists are set to display their fine works in a prestigious show encompassing life-sized sculpture, fine jewelry, striking works of art and hand-crafted apparel and decor. Whether your passions run to sparkling jewels and one of a kind paintings; exquisitely crafted glasswork or an art deco sculpture, you are su...

name: 26th Annual Hobe Sound Festival of the Arts
description: The Hobe Sound Festival of the Arts returns with the nation's top artists and skilled craft artisans. The festival is a community celebration on Dixie Highway from Bridge Road to Venus Street. The festival features a broad spectrum of mediums, designed to create a festive art marketplace for both the collector and first-time buyer. The event is hosted by the Hobe Sound Chamber of Commerce and produced by Howard Alan Events. Residents and visitors are invited to stroll amidst life-size sculptures, spectacular paintings, one-of-a-kind jewels, photography, ceramics and more from the artists who a...

name: The Longboat Key Festival of the Arts in Sarasota County
description:
Prepare to immerse yourself in the lively and thrilling Longboat Key Town Center Green! This public venue, situated near Publix on Bay Isles Road, serves as an ideal location for a community festival. With a lovely park area, there is ample room to unwind and relish the celebrations.

As you wander through the area, you'll be enchanted by the life-sized sculptures, breathtaking paintings, distinctive jewelry, stunning photography, and exquisite ceramics. Additionally, you'll have the opportunity to engage with both local and national artists about their creative inspirations and handcrafted ...

name: 39th Annual Downtown Sarasota Festival of the Arts
description:
The Big One! The Festival will fill Main Street, beginning at Orange Avenue and extending eastward to Links Avenue. The Festival's remarkable success each year has resulted in its expansion, covering over five city blocks and featuring more than 200 national and regional artists. The exceptional quality of the art, the free outdoor accessibility of the festival, and the variety of artistic expressions have contributed to the Festival of the Arts consistently being ranked among the top 100 art festivals in the country, as reported by Sunshine Artist Magazine.

Residents and visitors are invit...

name: 21st Annual Coconut Point Art Festival
description:
Get ready for a truly unforgettable experience at the Coconut Point Art Festival, also known as "The Big One"!

Transforming the already stunning Coconut Point into a paradise for art lovers, this prestigious showcase boasts over 200 exhibitors displaying life-size sculptures, breathtaking paintings, unique jewelry, stunning photography, and much more. Don't miss your chance to witness the masters at work and discover the inspiration behind every piece.

Not only is Coconut Point a visually stunning community surrounded by acres of lakes and boardwalks, it's also a bustling hub for shoppin...

name: 6th Annual Longboat Key Festival of the Arts in Sarasota County
description:
Get ready to experience the vibrant and exciting Longboat Key Town Center Green! This public space, located near Publix on Bay Isles Road, is the perfect spot for a community festival. With a beautiful community park area, you'll have plenty of space to relax and enjoy the festivities.

As you stroll through the complex, you'll be captivated by the life-size sculptures, stunning paintings, unique jewels, beautiful photography, and exquisite ceramics. Plus, you'll have the chance to meet and chat with both local and national artists about their creative inspirations and handmade works.

Thi...

name: 37th Annual Downtown Stuart Art Festival
description:
Get ready for a spectacular art festival experience in the heart of Downtown Stuart! This vibrant event will feature over 120 gallery-style booths showcasing every medium of fine art you can imagine.

As an art enthusiast, you won't want to miss this incredible opportunity to immerse yourself in the world of high-end art and culture. Not only will you have the chance to admire the stunning works on display, but you'll also be supporting the local businesses - proceeds from the festival will benefit the Stuart Main Street program.

When you're not exploring the galleries, you can soak up th...

name: 39th Annual Las Olas Art Fair Part II
description: Experience the magic of the Las Olas Art Fair, a beloved annual tradition in South Florida that brings together a diverse mix of longtime favorites and fresh new talent in the contemporary art scene. Don't miss the opportunity to meet the artists, learn about their techniques, commission a unique piece, and discover the inspiration behind each magnificent creation. Held over two days from 10 am to 5 pm, the iconic festival is the perfect chance to indulge in a wonderful day out, window-shop or dine at one of the fabulous sidewalk cafes on Las Olas Boulevard. With a wide range of art galleries,...

name: 26th Annual Downtown Venice Art Classic
description: Get ready for a celebration of creativity and community at the Downtown Venice Art Classic! This vibrant festival will transform downtown Venice into an art lover's paradise, featuring juried artists from across the country showcasing their work along West Venice Avenue. From breathtaking sculptures to stunning paintings, dazzling jewelry, and unique ceramics, there's something for everyone to enjoy. Best of all, this free, outdoor event benefits Venice Main Street, so you can feel good about supporting the local community while indulging in your passion for the arts.

name: 37th Annual ArtFest by the Sea at Juno Beach presented by Palm Beach Gardens Medical Center
description: Get ready for a one-of-a-kind artistic experience at the highly anticipated ArtFest by the Sea! This incredible event has been a beloved tradition for over 30 years, and it's returning to Juno Beach this March in a big way. With the combined efforts of Howard Alan Events, renowned for producing some of the best outdoor art festivals in the nation, and the Palm Beach North Chamber of Commerce, you can expect a stunning showcase of art across all mediums. The event will feature 300 exceptional artists and craft artisans from 30 different states, displaying an incredible array of diverse mediums,...

name: 5th Annual Downtown Sarasota Fine Art and Craft Fair
description:
Experience art like never before at the Downtown Sarasota Festival of the Arts! As you explore the festival, you'll discover stunning life-size sculptures, breathtaking paintings, handcrafted jewelry, mesmerizing photography, and one-of-a-kind ceramics—each piece created by some of the country’s most talented artists and craft artisans. 

Meet the artists, hear their stories, and get an inside look at their creative process as you explore the festival. In addition to the incredible art, you’ll also find a craft marketplace with a green market, offering a curated selection of handmade goods a...

name: 52nd Annual Tarpon Springs Fine Arts Festival on the Bayou with Craft Marketplace
description: The festival takes place at Craig Park on Spring Bayou, a picturesque waterfront park shaded by oak trees, located in the heart of Tarpon Springs. The area exudes an old Florida charm, featuring brick streets, beautifully restored Victorian homes, and cozy bungalows surrounding the festival site. Downtown offers a diverse selection of restaurants and shops, just a couple of blocks away. The historic Sponge Docks, which celebrate Greek culture, are within walking distance or a short trolley ride. The festival, located amidst these attractions, presents a distinctive opportunity to purchase fine...

name: 2nd Annual Downtown Palm Beach Gardens Fine Art Festival
description: Downtown Palm Beach Gardens is a bustling shopping hub situated in the center of Palm Beach Gardens. Featuring numerous large retail stores and a variety of well-liked restaurants, it is guaranteed to attract shoppers. Positioned off Alt A1A and in proximity to the Gardens Mall, this picturesque venue is ideal for hosting an art festival. The stunning showcase of “pop-up” galleries features thousands of exquisite works of art including life-sized sculpture, paintings, handcrafted fine jewelry, glassworks, photography and more. All artists are on site to discuss their inspirations and processes...

description:

Prepare to indulge in shopping and find that unique piece of art that will forever remind you of your time in the mountains. This art festival is a juried event, featuring artists presenting their best creations. Admission is complimentary, ensuring a memorable experience for all attendees. 

As the nation’s largest art festival producer, Howard Alan Events (HAE) sets the gold standard for outdoor art shows. With a reputation bui...

description: Shadyside… The Art Festival on Walnut Street is a beloved summer art exhibition situated in the Shadyside neighborhood of Pittsburgh, PA. This vibrant area, known for its tree-lined avenues, historic residences, and fashionable establishments, will once again be converted into an open-air gallery showcasing fine art. Walnut Street caters to all tastes, featuring distinctive local boutiques, and a wide array of restaurants, bars, and eateries offering diverse culinary options. Attendees can explore and acquire artwork from both national and local artists, ensuring there is something appealing f...

name: 17th Annual Downtown Venice Labor Day Weekend Craft Festival
28th Annual Punta Gorda Sullivan Street Craft Festival
description: Experience the vibrant Punta Gorda Craft Festival, where you can enjoy a remarkable display of beautiful arts and crafts created by the region's most skilled crafters. The event takes place on the lively Sullivan Street, which is transformed into a captivating realm of creativity and inspiration. Explore the picturesque city of Punta Gorda, often regarded as the heart of Charlotte County. This delightful destination features a charming downtown area that is a must-visit for anyone traveling to Florida's west coast. Don't miss the chance to immerse yourself in Punta Gorda's artistic culture—be ...

name: 4th Annual St. Armands Circle Art Festival with Craft Marketplace
description: If you're considering a visit to Sarasota, be sure to include this event in your itinerary! Just a short distance from Sarasota lies St. Armands Key, a luxurious retreat from the fast pace of mainland life. This charming destination offers a delightful escape, featuring an array of upscale shops and gourmet dining options. With its unique blend of history, beauty, and concept, St. Armands promises an unforgettable experience for all who visit. Over the course of two days, attendees will have the opportunity to explore creations from the finest local and national artists and crafters, including...

name: 31st Annual Downtown Delray Beach Craft Festival on 4th
description: American Craft Endeavors is thrilled to announce our return to Downtown Delray Beach for this year's craft festival this fall. The event will kick off at the intersection of E. Atlantic Ave and NE 4th Ave, right in the center of downtown. From there, the festival will extend north along NE 4th Ave for two complete blocks, reaching NE 2nd St. This prime downtown area is nestled among excellent shops and outstanding restaurants within a vibrant artistic community.

name: 33rd Annual Downtown Dunedin Craft Festival
description: Discover the allure and creativity of one of Florida's cherished towns at the Downtown Dunedin Craft Festival! Located just a few minutes from Clearwater and a short drive from Tampa, Dunedin offers a delightful blend of small-town charm and vibrant energy, making it an ideal destination for a weekend getaway. Take a leisurely walk down Main Street and uncover a remarkable array of handcrafted items from some of the nation’s top crafters. Whether you’re in search of ceramic planters, functional pottery, fashionable hair accessories, or distinctive handmade jewelry, you’re sure to find a unique...

name: 27th Annual Downtown Stuart Craft Festival
description: Situated along the St. Lucie River, Downtown Stuart is a vibrant hub of activity every day. Boasting more than 70 shops, eateries, and boutiques, this charming downtown area attracts both residents and tourists seeking the cozy atmosphere of a small town combined with urban conveniences. The Downtown Stuart Craft Festival is ideally positioned to enhance your experience! Featuring both local and visiting artisans, your time in Downtown Stuart guarantees a delightful sensory experience. This remarkable weekend festival is an event you won't want to overlook. Please note this event was previousl...

name: 30th Anniversary Downtown Sarasota Craft Festival
description: The event will take place in the vibrant Downtown Sarasota, specifically at 5 Points Park, situated at the intersection of Central and First Street. Sarasota is renowned for its stunning white sandy beaches, welcoming residents and tourists, and charming architecture. Attendees can explore a diverse selection of jewelry, ceramics, photography, clothing, and more. Additionally, an extensive Green Market featuring handmade soaps, gourmet spices, and freshly popped kettle corn will enhance the weekend experience.

name: 3rd Annual Wesley Chapel Craft Festival at the Shops at Wiregrass (Tampa Bay area)
description: Come and experience the Shops at Wiregrass! This festival showcases modern crafts from some of the country's most skilled crafters in a free community gathering. You will find an array of handmade items, including jewelry, pottery, ceramics, photography, clothing, and more, all crafted in the USA.

name: Lakewood Ranch Art Festival at UTC with Craft Marketplace
description: Lakewood Ranch is an award-winning community in southwest Florida. The Mall at University Town Center (UTC) stands out as the top destination for shopping, dining, and entertainment in Lakewood Ranch, many of which are exclusive to the area. This show features a stunning array of original, hand-crafted artwork, including paintings, pottery, jewelry, photography, and much more. The event also includes a Craft Marketplace, featuring unique hand-made soaps, clothing, and home decor. This is a rare opportunity to meet the artists in person and gain insight into the inspiration behind their one-of-...

name: Clearwater Craft Festival at Coachman Park
description: Coachman Park is situated in the center of Downtown Clearwater, Florida. This beautiful waterfront location boasts paved paths, vibrant green areas, and picturesque views of the water. The park is home to numerous lively events throughout the year, and we are thrilled to introduce our craft festival to this well-loved venue. The festival showcases handmade arts and crafts alongside a green market section, providing a wide selection of curated items and environmentally friendly products for visitors to explore and buy.

name: 24th Annual Juno Beach Craft Festival on the Ocean
description:
Come to Juno Beach! Explore a variety of handcrafted leather items, artwork, photography, custom products, glass creations, and much more—all proudly made in the USA! This craft festival is a beloved event in Palm Beach that you won't want to miss. Take a leisurely walk along the picturesque A1A in Juno Beach and discover exquisite handmade crafts for every budget, while engaging with some of the finest artisans in the country. Get ahead on your holiday shopping at this fantastic free craft event. Parking is conveniently located at Loggerhead Park or along A1A, just north of Loggerhead Park.
...

name: 6th Annual Palm Harbor Craft Festival
description: Nestled along Florida's west coast, right next to the Gulf of Mexico, Palm Harbor is a vibrant community known for its small-town charm. Often referred to as the jewel of Tampa Bay, this city lies just north of Dunedin and showcases a nostalgic architectural landscape that reflects Florida's history. Numerous restaurants and retail shops are housed in historic buildings and residences. Experience the exceptional craftsmanship of the nation’s finest crafters at this event, taking place on Florida Avenue, Palm Harbor’s main thoroughfare, just east of Alternate 19.

name: 8th Annual Punta Gorda Thanksgiving Weekend Sullivan Street Craft Festival
description: The event is scheduled for Thanksgiving weekend, making it an ideal opportunity to kick off your holiday shopping! Join us to connect with some of the finest crafters from across the country while exploring the delightful streets of Punta Gorda. Nestled along the shores of the Peace River and the Gulf of Mexico in Southwest Florida, Punta Gorda is frequently referred to as the heart of Charlotte County. You truly haven't experienced a picturesque downtown until you've explored this stunning region on Florida’s West Coast.

name: The Coconut Point Holiday Craft Festival
description: The festival takes place outdoors at Coconut Point, a charming lifestyle center situated in Estero. The craft festival is set to occur in conjunction with the Tropical Holiday Celebration on Saturday. It features a car show, live music, a parade, and a tree lighting ceremony. Booths will be arranged along the sidewalks adjacent to the storefronts. Discover a diverse array of unique and high-quality wares, ranging from intricately designed home decor to stunning wearable accessories, all made with exceptional craftsmanship. The festival is organized by American Craft Endeavors, which is the sis...

name: 30th Anniversary Downtown Dunedin Art Festival with Craft Marketplace
description: Dunedin is one of the oldest towns on the  west coast of Florida, just a short drive from Tampa and home to the Downtown Dunedin Art Festival. Marking its 30th Anniversary, the Downtown Dunedin Art Festival runs down Main Street and showcases award-winning fine artists. Meet the artists and explore an array of mediums including sculpture, photography, glass, paintings, ceramics, jewelry, mixed media and more! This year's event will also feature a seperate craft marketplace.

name: 30th Anniversary Punta Gorda Sullivan Street Craft Festival
description:
The Punta Gorda Craft Festival continues to grow and highlight the talents of many unique crafters, providing the area with one of its most enjoyable winter traditions. Come meet and visit with some of the nation’s best crafters while enjoying the charming streets of Punta Gorda. Located along the banks of the Peace River and the Gulf of Mexico in Southwest Florida sits the beautiful city of Punta Gorda, often described as the heartbeat of Charlotte County. You have not experienced a charming downtown location until you've visited this beautiful area on Florida’s west coast.

Parking is avai...

name: 3rd Annual Coconut Point Art & Craft Festival
description: The festival takes place outdoors at Coconut Point, a charming lifestyle center situated in Estero. Discover a diverse array of unique and high-quality wares, ranging from intricately designed home decor to stunning wearable accessories, all made with exceptional craftsmanship. The festival is organized by American Craft Endeavors, which is the sister company of Howard Alan Events, known for hosting the Coconut Point Art Fair in November and February.

name: 19th Annual Downtown Venice Craft Festival
description: Join us in Downtown Venice to browse and purchase a wide variety of ceramics, jewelry, stained glass, metal works and much more. Our event will be set up along West Venice Avenue, one of Venice’s historic downtown streets. In addition to the incredible crafts, our Green Market offers live flora, freshly popped kettle corn, gourmet spices, and sauces. Come meet and visit with some of the nation’s best crafters, as you stroll along downtown Venice. Located on Florida's west coast, Venice is a vibrant town filled with historic charm, natural beauty, and independently owned shops and restaurants.

name: 26th Annual Hobe Sound Festival of the Arts
description: The Hobe Sound Festival of the Arts returns with the nation's top artists and skilled craft artisans. The festival is a community celebration on Dixie Highway from Bridge Road to Venus Street. The festival features a broad spectrum of mediums, designed to create a festive art marketplace for both the collector and first-time buyer. The event is hosted by the Hobe Sound Chamber of Commerce and produced by Howard Alan Events. Residents and visitors are invited to stroll amidst life-size sculptures, spectacular paintings, one-of-a-kind jewels, photography, ceramics and more from the artists who a...

name: 2nd Annual Downtown Palm Beach Gardens Art and Craft Festival
description: Downtown at the Gardens is a bustling shopping hub situated in the center of Palm Beach Gardens. Featuring numerous large retail stores and a variety of well-liked restaurants, it is guaranteed to attract shoppers. Positioned off Alt A1A and in proximity to the Garden Malls, this picturesque venue is ideal for hosting an Art and Craft festival. Whether you're looking for ceramic planters, functional pottery, stylish hair accessories, or unique handmade jewelry, you’ll find something special to take home.

name: 2nd Annual Boca Raton Art and Craft Festival at the Town Center at Boca Raton
description: We are set to return to the Town Center Mall in February for a fantastic art and craft festival. The Town Center at Boca Raton is recognized as one of South Florida's top luxury shopping destinations and serves as a major attraction in Boca. It features a wide range of specialty shops, fine dining options, and plenty of parking. Local and national artists and crafters will showcase their fine art and quality craft, transforming the magnificent center into a spectacular festival experience.

name: The Celebration Craft Festival at Celebration Town Center
description: Celebration, Florida, is a thoughtfully designed community that was initially created by The Walt Disney Company, situated only 5 miles south of the Walt Disney World Resort. It serves as a desirable and charming residential neighborhood within the Orlando area. Celebration Town Center offers shopping, dining, outdoor recreation, and entertainment in a walkable setting. Local and national crafters will showcase their fine art and quality craft, transforming the magnificent center into a spectacular festival experience.

name: 7th Annual Downtown Delray Beach Craft Festival on 4th
description:
Get ready to experience the ultimate celebration of craft artisanship in Downtown Delray Beach!

Join us on NE 4th Avenue for a one-of-a-kind craft festival that showcases the best of local and national crafters. This festival is the perfect opportunity to immerse yourself in a lively artistic community that is bursting with energy and creativity. Discover a diverse array of unique and high-quality wares, ranging from intricately designed home decor to stunning wearable accessories, all made with exceptional craftsmanship.

The show starts at the entrance of E. Atlantic Ave and NE 4th Ave ...

name: 37th Annual ArtFest by the Sea at Juno Beach presented by Palm Beach Gardens Medical Center
description: Get ready for a one-of-a-kind artistic experience at the highly anticipated ArtFest by the Sea! This incredible event has been a beloved tradition for over 30 years, and it's returning to Juno Beach this March in a big way. With the combined efforts of Howard Alan Events, renowned for producing some of the best outdoor art festivals in the nation, and the Palm Beach North Chamber of Commerce, you can expect a stunning showcase of art across all mediums. The event will feature 300 exceptional artists and craft artisans from 30 different states, displaying an incredible array of diverse mediums,...

name: 11th Annual Punta Gorda Sullivan Street Craft Festival
description:
Don't miss the lively and vibrant Punta Gorda Craft Festival, where you'll be treated to an incredible showcase of exquisite arts and crafts, skillfully crafted by the most talented craft artisans in the region. The festival takes place along the bustling Sullivan Street, which is transformed into an enchanting wonderland of creativity and inspiration.

Come and discover the picturesque city of Punta Gorda, known as the heart and soul of Charlotte County, this enchanting destination boasts a charming downtown area that's simply a must-see for all visitors to Florida's west coast.

In partn...

name: 5th Annual Downtown Sarasota Fine Art and Craft Fair
description:
Experience art like never before at the Downtown Sarasota Festival of the Arts! As you explore the festival, you'll discover stunning life-size sculptures, breathtaking paintings, handcrafted jewelry, mesmerizing photography, and one-of-a-kind ceramics—each piece created by some of the country’s most talented artists and craft artisans. 

Meet the artists, hear their stories, and get an inside look at their creative process as you explore the festival. In addition to the incredible art, you’ll also find a craft marketplace with a green market, offering a curated selection of handmade goods a...

name: 52nd Annual Tarpon Springs Fine Arts Festival on the Bayou with Craft Marketplace
description: The festival takes place at Craig Park on Spring Bayou, a picturesque waterfront park shaded by oak trees, located in the heart of Tarpon Springs. The area exudes an old Florida charm, featuring brick streets, beautifully restored Victorian homes, and cozy bungalows surrounding the festival site. Downtown offers a diverse selection of restaurants and shops, just a couple of blocks away. The historic Sponge Docks, which celebrate Greek culture, are within walking distance or a short trolley ride. The festival, located amidst these attractions, presents a distinctive opportunity to purchase fine...

name: 2nd Annual Hobe Sound Spring Craft Festival
description: From unique jewelry pieces to ceramics, pottery, personalized gifts, and many other fascinating items, there's something for everyone to admire and take home.The event is free admission and pets on leashes are always welcomed. The festival will take place on SE Dixie Highway, extending from SE Bridge Road to SE Olympus Street. Free parking and trolley service to the show for all festival visitors is at the Pine School, 12350 SE Federal Hwy, Hobe Sound, FL 33455.

name: 34th Annual Downtown Dunedin Craft Festival
description:
Make the short drive to Dunedin for a weekend of craft, culture, and coastal charm. The Downtown Dunedin Craft Festival takes over Main Street, offering a delightful selection of handmade treasures, from stylish hair accessories to ceramic planters for your garden.

After you’ve browsed the artists’ tents, wander through our expansive the green market to find artisanal soaps and small-batch spices. Grab a coffee, walk the trail, and support independent creators in the heart of the city!

name: 30th Anniversary Downtown Stuart Art & Craft Festival
description:
Join us in the heart of historic Stuart for a curated showcase of the nation’s finest artists and craft artisans. Stretching along SW Osceola Street, this open-air event transforms downtown into a premier destination for collectors and enthusiasts alike.

Beyond the juried art and craft displays, featuring everything from intricate woodwork to bespoke jewelry, visitors can explore our signature green market. Discover artisan soaps, exotic plants, and small-batch gourmet dips.
